name: SOUTHERN COPPER CORP/
summary: Southern Copper Corporation is one of the largest integrated copper producers in the world, operating mining, smelting, and refining facilities in Peru and Mexico. The company produces copper, molybdenum, zinc, silver, gold, and lead through open-pit and underground mines. Key operations include Toquepala and Cuajone mines in Peru and La Caridad, Buenavista, and IMMSA units in Mexico. The company believes it holds the largest copper reserves in the world.

products.name: Copper cathodes
products.description: Refined copper produced via smelting and electrolytic refining or SX-EW technology.

products.name: Molybdenum concentrate
products.description: By-product from copper mining used in alloy steels, fertilizers, dyes, and reagents.

products.name: Zinc
products.description: Produced from open-pit and underground mines, used for corrosion protection and die casting.

products.name: Silver
products.description: Refined silver produced at precious metals plants in Ilo, Peru and La Caridad, Mexico.

products.name: Gold
products.description: Produced as a by-product at precious metals plants in Peru and Mexico.

products.name: Copper rod
products.description: Refined copper rod produced at the La Caridad rod plant in Mexico.

products.name: Sulfuric acid
products.description: By-product of copper smelting operations in Peru.

products.name: Lead
products.description: Produced by IMMSA underground mining unit in Mexico.
